name: Route Map - JW Marriott to Marriott
description: Austin downtown grid — reverse route: north on East 1st St, across Brazos, north on East 2nd St

instructions.action: Start at East 1st Street and San Jacinto Boulevard
Head north on East 1st Street to Brazos Street
Turn right onto Brazos Street heading east
Arrive at East 2nd Street and Brazos Street
